summary: US-841 release gate passed for the default component. Implementation, integration tests, component regression, accessibility, visual regression, and localStorage compatibility evidence are complete for the start/resume workflow. AC-2420 and AC-2421 have passing evidence, full project verification passes, and release scope remains local-only without multi-save/backend/account/sync/mobile/tutorial creep.

tests_run.details: 9 test files passed, 74 tests passed, production build passed

dependency_reports.PERSONAL-TASK-1129: MZ-000 deterministic integration harness; verified earlier by npm run verify
dependency_reports.PERSONAL-TASK-1131: MZ-102 persistence implementation; covered by src/persistence/saveStore.test.ts and Spexus checkpoint

evidence_matrix.scenario: Player starts a new local bullet by choosing a supported size before first deal creation.
Player with a valid unfinished saved bullet gets an explicit continue/start-new prompt; continue restores saved state; start-new replaces the active bullet.
evidence_matrix.limitations: jsdom integration plus desktop browser visual evidence.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Versioned localStorage schema restores valid active bullets and safely rejects corrupt, unsupported, malformed, finished, and completed saved data.
Clean start, invalid-save fallback, saved-bullet resume, and after-start-new desktop layouts are readable and non-overlapping.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Desktop/laptop viewport only as scoped by task.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Design doc is local project artifact.
Vitest jsdom integration because project has no Playwright dependency.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: Real-browser visual/focus covered by MZ-105/MZ-106 evidence.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No mobile completeness required for MVP per MZ-106.
No backend or Playwright package exists.

quality_gate_matrix.evidence_source: npm run verify; this release gate report
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No feature flag or rollback mechanism exists; changes are local frontend/persistence only.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: Rollback is git revert of local source changes if needed.

release_notes.summary: US-841 adds a local start/resume workflow for the browser remake.
known_limitations: One active local bullet only; no multi-save.
No full mobile UX completion in this US.
release_notes.rollback: Revert the US-841 source changes and generated task reports; localStorage data is client-local and invalid/corrupt saves fall back safely to start screen.

non_blocking_notes: Clean up orchestrator-log current phase / last completed task wording.
